mapper.select: SELECT p.*, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.username, ''), CONCAT('用户#', p.user_id)) AS author_name, u.avatar_url AS avatar_url FROM community_post p LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_post ( user_id, title, content, type, visibility, tags, related_problem_id, related_path_id, related_level_id, path_id, chapter_id, level_id, likes, comments, views, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{visibility}, #{tags}, #{relatedProblemId}, #{relatedPathId}, #{relatedLevelId}, #{pathId}, #{chapterId}, #{levelId}, 0, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE community_post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, type = #{type}, visibility = #{visibility}, tags = #{tags}, related_problem_id = #{relatedProblemId}, related_path_id = #{relatedPathId}, related_level_id = #{relatedLevelId}, path_id = #{pathId}, chapter_id = #{chapterId}, level_id = #{levelId}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM community_post WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE community_post SET likes = likes + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE community_post SET views = views + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.username, ''), CONCAT('用户#', c.user_id)) AS author_name, u.avatar_url AS avatar_url FROM community_comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY c.create_time ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_comment (post_id, user_id, content, parent_id, likes, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{parentId}, 0, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM community_comment WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE community_comment SET likes = likes + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT c.*, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.username, ''), CONCAT('用户#', c.user_id)) AS author_name, u.avatar_url AS avatar_url FROM community_comment c INNER JOIN community_post p ON p.id = c.post_id LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = c.user_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND COALESCE(p.visibility, 'public') = 'public' ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{page}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_comment c INNER JOIN community_post p ON p.id = c.post_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} AND COALESCE(p.visibility, 'public') = 'public'

SELECT p.*, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.username, ''), CONCAT('用户#', p.user_id)) AS author_name, u.avatar_url AS avatar_url FROM community_post p LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND COALESCE(p.visibility, 'public') = 'public' ORDER BY p.create_time DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{page}

SELECT p.*, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.username, ''), CONCAT('用户#', p.user_id)) AS author_name, u.avatar_url AS avatar_url FROM community_post p LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = p.user_id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND COALESCE(p.visibility, 'public') = 'public'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post WHERE COALESCE(visibility, 'public') = 'public'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_comment c INNER JOIN community_post p ON p.id = c.post_id WHERE COALESCE(p.visibility, 'public') = 'public'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) FROM ( SELECT user_id FROM community_post WHERE create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND COALESCE(visibility, 'public') = 'public' UNION SELECT c.user_id FROM community_comment c INNER JOIN community_post p ON p.id = c.post_id WHERE c.create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND COALESCE(p.visibility, 'public') = 'public' ) AS active_users
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community_post WHERE DATE(create_time) = DATE(NOW()) AND COALESCE(visibility, 'public') = 'public'

SELECT CASE type WHEN 'note' THEN '学习笔记' WHEN 'discussion' THEN 'Discussion' WHEN 'question' THEN 'Question' WHEN 'share' THEN 'Share' ELSE IFNULL(type, 'Other') END AS name, COUNT(*) AS count FROM community_post WHERE COALESCE(visibility, 'public') = 'public' GROUP BY type ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
